name: Twenty
description: An adaptable CRM solution for seamless team collaboration and growth
compose:
name: slashnode-twenty
services:
  server:
    image: twentycrm/twenty:v2.16.1
    container_name: twenty-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      NODE_PORT: '3000'
      PG_DATABASE_URL: postgres://postgres:postgres@twenty-db:5432/default
      SERVER_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:2020
      REDIS_URL: redis://twenty-redis:6379
      APP_SECRET: 2Gn5puuVCH0SI386E9RqOqHm0hGIAyrB
    volumes:
      - server_data-server-local-data:/app/packages/twenty-server/.local-storage
      - server_data-docker-data:/app/docker-data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:2020:3000
  worker:
    image: twentycrm/twenty:v2.16.1
    container_name: twenty-worker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - yarn
      - worker:prod
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      server:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      PG_DATABASE_URL: postgres://postgres:postgres@twenty-db:5432/default
      SERVER_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:2020
      REDIS_URL: redis://twenty-redis:6379
      DISABLE_DB_MIGRATIONS: 'true'
      DISABLE_CRON_JOBS_REGISTRATION: 'true'
      APP_SECRET: 2Gn5puuVCH0SI386E9RqOqHm0hGIAyrB
    volumes:
      - worker_data-server-local-data:/app/packages/twenty-server/.local-storage
  db:
    image: postgres:16.8
    container_name: twenty-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: default
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
    volumes:
      - db_data-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.2
    container_name: twenty-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-server-local-data:
    name: slashnode-twenty_server_data-server-local-data
  server_data-docker-data:
    name: slashnode-twenty_server_data-docker-data
  worker_data-server-local-data:
    name: slashnode-twenty_worker_data-server-local-data
  db_data-db-data:
    name: slashnode-twenty_db_data-db-data
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-twenty_redis_data-redis
